schema.name: TZPID source truth generated from canonical equation master

theory.technical_interpretation: Definition of S^ij is an algebraic definition, written S^ij = γ^ikSkj. It is an algebraic definition expressing the quantity directly in terms of the variables on its right-hand side. It is built from γ, k, S, j, defining S^ij. Within the Trawin Zero Point registry it serves as one element of the framework's mathematical narrative.
